steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The first sentence says the researchers determined the ratio of three plant subtypes. The second clause says they determined the relative quantities of the plants consumed. These are the same idea—one clarifies or restates the other.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: That is, signals that the following statement clarifies or restates the preceding one. The other three signal different logical relationships: addition, contrast, and sequence. That matches choice A — A is correct.
